name: stackra/tax
purpose: Tax rules + computation — TaxJurisdiction, TaxRate, TaxExemption, TaxCalculation aggregates for per-jurisdiction rate math on invoice lines.
capabilities: TaxRate (txr_ prefix) — per-jurisdiction rate with time bounds
Effective-date range support on every rate row
when_to_use: A tenant sells in one or more tax jurisdictions and needs per-line tax computation plus exemption support.
when_not_to_use: For external tax-service integrations (Avalara / TaxJar), configure a Gateway integration instead.
